learning_outcomes.description: Identify relevant regulation and frameworks to inform voluntary and mandatory sustainability and climate related disclosures.
Evaluate material climate related risks for an organisation.
Reflect on challenges of preparing sustainability and climate related disclosures from both internal and external stakeholder’s perspectives.
Work effectively as part of a team to create and communicate evaluations of organisation’s sustainability and climate related disclosures and their assurance.

assessments.assessment_title: A1: In class Quiz (6 quizzes worth 5% each)
assessments.due_date:
Quiz 1 Week 2,

Quiz 2 Week 3,

Quiz 3 Week 5,

Quiz 4 Week 6,

Quiz 5 Week 9,

Quiz 6 Week 11,

There are six online quizzes that can be accessed via the course BB site. Three of the six quizzes are to be completed during the seminar time, specifically: (1) Seminar 5 (quiz in class); (2) Seminar 9 (quiz in class) and (3) seminar 11 (quiz in class). The duration of each quiz is 30 minutes, exam conditions will apply and you will be supervised by the lecturer and facilitator.

The remaining three quizzes must be completed by 4pm on Monday following the seminar (e.g. if you chose to complete quiz #1 which is based on seminar #2 held on Thursday 6 August, you must complete the quiz by 4pm on Monday 10 August).
assessments.task_description: Six in-class quizzes completed at the conclusion of week 2, 3, 5, 6, 9 and 11 seminars.
assessments.submission_guidelines: You will complete the quizzes via the course BB site.
assessments.deferral_or_extension: You may be able to apply for an extension.
assessments.late_submission: Exams submitted after the end of the submission time will incur a late penalty.
assessments.additional_info: You may be able to apply for an extension.

assessments.assessment_title: A2: In class Hand Ins (4 hand-ins worth 5% each)
assessments.due_date:
Hand-in #1 31/08/2026

Hand-in #2 14/09/2026

Hand-in #3 6/10/2026

Hand-in #4 19/10/2026

You should be able to complete the hand-in during class. However, additional time is allowed with each hand-in due by 4pm on Monday of the following week. For example, the hand-in for week 5 (started during the seminar on 27/08) is due by 4pm on Monday of week 6 (i.e. 31/08)
assessments.category: Participation/ Student contribution, Tutorial/ Problem Set
assessments.task_description:
Four Hand Ins are due for seminar weeks 5, 7, 9 and 11.

Individual component to write one-page response to individual activity.
assessments.submission_guidelines: Hand-ins are to be submitted via the course BB site
assessments.deferral_or_extension: You may be able to apply for an extension.
assessments.late_submission: A penalty of 10% of the maximum possible mark will be deducted per 24 hours from time submission is due for up to 7 days. After 7 days, you will receive a mark of 0.
assessments.additional_info: You may be able to apply for an extension.

assessments.assessment_title: A3: Final Case Study - Part A - Presentation
assessments.task_description: Analysis of the case for business sustainability based on experiences in Sustainability Management Simulation: Net Zero supported by independent research. There are two components: (a) Group presentation (approximately 15 minutes) in-class week 12, and (b) Individual reports.
assessments.submission_guidelines: You may be able to apply for an extension.
assessments.deferral_or_extension: You may be able to apply for an extension.
assessments.late_submission: Late submissions are not accepted for in-class presentations.
assessments.additional_info: You may be able to apply for an extension.

assessments.assessment_title: A4: Final Case Study - Part B- Individual Write Up
assessments.task_description: Analysis of the case for business sustainability based on experiences in Sustainability Management Simulation: Net Zero supported by independent research. There are two components: (a) Group presentation (approximately 15 minutes) in-class week 12, and (b) Individual reports.
assessments.submission_guidelines: You may be able to apply for an extension.
assessments.deferral_or_extension: You may be able to apply for an extension.
assessments.late_submission: A penalty of 10% of the maximum possible mark will be deducted per 24 hours from time submission is due for up to 7 days. After 7 days, you will receive a mark of 0.
assessments.additional_info: You may be able to apply for an extension.
